author: codex

patch.value: Release tag date drift makes changelog check fail

npm run changelog:check -- --json regenerates the current package release heading with today's date instead of the existing release tag date when --release-version-from-package and --until-release-tag are used.
Release-context generation derives the release heading date from the existing release tag when no explicit --date is passed, and changelog:check passes.
Check mode reports changed=false when CHANGELOG.md already matches the package release tag.
Check mode exits 1 with changed=true because the generated heading is 2026.5.24-15 - 2026-05-25 while the checked-in heading is 2026.5.24-15 - 2026-05-24.

message: Track release tag date drift check failure

value.author: codex
value.text: Implemented release-context date propagation: existing release tag timestamp now supplies the generated heading date when --until-release-tag is used and --date is omitted.

patch.value: Fixed in release-context, CLI, and extension: the existing release tag timestamp now provides the default changelog heading date when --until-release-tag is used without an explicit --date.
Fixed release tag date drift by deriving the default heading date from the existing release tag timestamp; verified npm test and npm run changelog:check -- --json.

value.author: codex-active-continuation
value.text: Followed up on PR review feedback after the initial fix: release tag timestamp is now resolved whenever a matching package release tag exists so the heading date is stable even without --until-release-tag, while --until remains gated by --until-release-tag. Expanded timestamp date parsing to accept T, space, or date-only separators. Added CLI coverage for package-version tag date derivation without limiting the release window. Verified npm test, npm run changelog:check -- --json, and npm run check.

value.author: codex-active-continuation
value.text: Post-rebase verification found the package-owned all-release-tags changelog check was stale on the updated 2026.5.25 main base. Regenerated CHANGELOG.md with npm run changelog:full -- --json and re-ran npm run changelog:check -- --json successfully (changed=false, itemCount=48).

value.author: codex-active-continuation
value.text: CI parity follow-up: fetched origin tags locally and reproduced GitHub Actions changelog:check failure caused by the newly visible v2026.05.25 tag. Regenerated CHANGELOG.md with npm run changelog:full -- --json using the full tag set, then verified npm run changelog:check -- --json and npm run check pass.
